sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n57652" key="klagero/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">κλᾰγερός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ά</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n57652.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">screaming</tr_>, of cranes, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.109.8</biblScope> </bibl> (Antip.).</sense> </entryFree>
